chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 940 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 07.12.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for respondents No.3 & 4. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for respondents No.3 & 4 has filed a statement stating that petitioner is being paid increased pension. Learned Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
